hero.title: Bridging the Maturity Gap
hero.subtitle: We don’t build websites; we build proprietary machines that sit on your balance sheet. Identify your leaks and orchestrate your engine.

tiers.name: Phase I: The Diagnostic EKG
tiers.subtitle: Foundations & Perception
tiers.description: Establish your perimeter, set up your digital gateway, and reclaim 15 hours a week in manual admin waste.

tiers.name: Phase II: Engine Orchestration
tiers.subtitle: Harmony & Execution
tiers.description: Stop marketing decorating. Start revenue engineering. A balanced 60% brand building and 40% sales activation approach.

tiers.name: Phase III: Unified Engine
tiers.subtitle: Sovereignty & The Alabrida Bridge
tiers.description: Replace six-figure legacy vendor dependencies with your own sovereign infrastructure. Full preparation for Alabrida handoff.

milestones: Execute the 250+ point Revenue Journey Rubric

curriculum.description: Running the 250+ point diagnostic to find electrical failure in your revenue.
Securing your 2-5 social profiles for optimal Signal Capture.
Building the core HTML website meant for deep deliberation.
Implementing your Custom CRM and ending manual entry bias.
Digitizing offline networking with signatures and lead magnets.
Installing Clarity and Google Tags for real-time buyer perception.
Building the 4 ad-specific endpoints to close intent.
Executing the operational content calendar and templates.
Deploying lead nurture and review management sequences.
Calculating the hidden cost of your overlapping software tools.
Preparing the jump to self-hosted sovereign infrastructure.
